'''Sancretti Arms & Munitions, Interstellar''' was a [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] weapons manufacturer. They produced a variety of [[whip]]s, including the [[Rodian cryogen whip]] and the [[Sancretti Arms Whip]].

{{Company-stub}}
